creator: carlos@reendex.com
text:
Facing a similar problem here on a client with Ubuntu 20.04.3 with "5.4.0-100-generic" kernel:

kernel: [462910.890773] INFO: task php-fpm8.0:4123147 blocked for more than 120 seconds.
kernel: [462910.892885]       Not tainted 5.4.0-100-generic #113-Ubuntu
kernel: [462910.894329] "echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/hung_task_timeout_secs" disables this message.
kernel: [462910.896474] php-fpm8.0      D    0 4123147 4123143 0x00000324
kernel: [462910.896480] Call Trace:
kernel: [462910.896491]  __schedule+0x2e3/0x740
